chapters.title: Load FASTA, branch, and reverse-complement
chapters.summary: Start with a deterministic local sequence operation pipeline.
checkpoints: Workflow executes without warnings or errors.
Derived sequence IDs include a branch and reverse-complement product.

chapters.title: Load pGEX and digest with BamHI/EcoRI
chapters.summary: Demonstrates deterministic restriction digest product generation.
checkpoints: Digest operation completes and creates fragment sequence IDs.
Fragment IDs are deterministic across repeated runs.

chapters.title: Guide practical filtering and oligo generation
chapters.summary: Covers guide-set creation, practical filtering, and oligo generation.
checkpoints: Guide set and passed guide set are present in metadata.
Oligo set generation succeeds for passed guides.

chapters.title: Digest -> Ligation -> ExtractRegion minimal slice
chapters.summary: Minimal end-to-end cloning operation chain used as a regression slice.
checkpoints: Digest creates at least two fragments for ligation input.

chapters.title: Guide oligo export (CSV + protocol)
chapters.summary: Retains one representative oligo CSV and one protocol text artifact for GitHub inspection.
checkpoints: CSV export file exists and contains guide rows.
Protocol text export exists and contains checklist content.

chapters.title: Prepare a reference genome cache (online)
chapters.summary: Network/tooling-dependent chapter, executed only with explicit online opt-in.
checkpoints: Genome preparation runs only when GENTLE_TEST_ONLINE is enabled.
Offline generation still emits the chapter with execution status noted.
